description.zh: System Prompt 的 4 层动态组装过程：基础身份 → 工具定义 → CLAUDE.md → 动态上下文
description.en: 4-layer dynamic System Prompt assembly: base identity → tool definitions → CLAUDE.md → dynamic context

annotation.zh: Prompt 不是静态字符串，而是动态管线
annotation.en: Prompt is not a static string, but a dynamic pipeline

content.zh:
L1: 注入基础身份
"You are Claude, an AI programming assistant..."
~2K tokens
content.en:
L1: Inject base identity
"You are Claude, an AI programming assistant..."
~2K tokens

annotation.zh: 定义 AI 的角色和行为规范
annotation.en: Define AI's role and behavior rules

annotation.zh: 告诉模型可以使用哪些工具
annotation.en: Tell model which tools are available

content.zh:
L3: 搜索 CLAUDE.md
✗ ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md
✓ ~/project/CLAUDE.md → 找到!

规则: [TypeScript strict, 先测试再提交]
~5K tokens
content.en:
L3: Search for CLAUDE.md
✗ ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md
✓ ~/project/CLAUDE.md → Found!

Rules: [TypeScript strict, test before commit]
~5K tokens

annotation.zh: 项目级配置注入，逐级向上搜索
annotation.en: Project-level config injection, search upward level by level

content.zh:
L4: 注入动态上下文
打开文件: auth.ts, index.ts
Git 分支: fix/login-bug
LSP 诊断: 2 errors
~8K tokens
content.en:
L4: Inject dynamic context
Open files: auth.ts, index.ts
Git branch: fix/login-bug
LSP diagnostics: 2 errors
~8K tokens

annotation.zh: 当前环境信息，每次请求动态生成
annotation.en: Current environment info, dynamically generated per request

content.zh:
最终 System Prompt: ~30K tokens
由 4 层管线动态组装完成
content.en:
Final System Prompt: ~30K tokens
Dynamically assembled by 4-layer pipeline

annotation.zh: 实际的 prompt 比你想象的大得多
annotation.en: Actual prompt is much larger than you think

content.zh: 帮我修复 auth.ts 的 bug
content.en: Help me fix the bug in auth.ts

annotation.zh: 用户输入 + 30K system prompt 一起发送给模型
annotation.en: User input + 30K system prompt sent to model together
